summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All requested features verified: demo credentials removed from login, yellow color removed (Switch component fixed), Hesap column and Hesap Oluştur button visible in Müşteriler, E-posta Ayarları page fully functional with SMTP settings and templates.

issues: Fixed React hydration warning - syntax error ')}}' changed to ')}'

Fixed Switch component to use bg-slate-900 instead of bg-primary for consistent navy theme
